releaseNotes:
• TV: you can now open a channel's menu with the remote — hold OK/Select on a channel for a moment to open it (a quick press still plays). This makes "Open in Multi-view" and the other options reachable without a touchscreen.
• New setting "Confirm to exit" (Settings › General): when on, pressing Back on the main screen asks for a second Back before closing the app, so you don't exit by accident. Off by default.
• TV: fixed the left arrow not returning to the category list from a channel in the Live guide. Pressing left now reliably brings the category list back and highlights the current category.
